goal: Complete the Back-End Developer application at Quantum Paradigm autonomously until a protected or final review checkpoint.
summary: GradLaunch could not reuse the persistent Chrome profile because it is already in use. Close the other GradLaunch-controlled Chrome session or point BROWSER_PROFILE_DIR at the signed-in profile you want to reuse. Falling back to a fresh isolated browser session is disabled so your login state is preserved.
validationErrors: By using this form you agree with the storage and handling of your data by this website.

subgoals.label: Open job page
subgoals.detail: Job page opened successfully in a visible Chrome session.

subgoals.label: Handle login if needed
subgoals.detail: Protected checkpoint cleared. Resuming autonomous execution.

subgoals.label: Finish active section
subgoals.detail: GradLaunch could not reuse the persistent Chrome profile because it is already in use. Close the other GradLaunch-controlled Chrome session or point BROWSER_PROFILE_DIR at the signed-in profile you want to reuse. Falling back to a fresh isolated browser session is disabled so your login state is preserved.

subgoals.label: Recover from validation errors
subgoals.detail: Validation or required-answer blockers were found: By using this form you agree with the storage and handling of your data by this website..

subgoals.label: Retry alternative path
subgoals.detail: Planner saw the same screen again and is attempting a different recovery path.

subgoals.label: Reach submit/review gate
subgoals.detail: Reached the final step but could not safely finish the submit action.

subgoals.label: Save checkpoint
subgoals.detail: Saved planner state at the final manual review checkpoint.
